data.name: ObjectIsReadOnly
data.value: Object is read-only.

data.name: BindUriTemplateToNullOrEmptyPathParam
data.value: Bind parameters cannot be null or empty for path variable '{0}'.

data.name: UTAdditionalDefaultIsInvalid
data.value: The additional default value with key '{0}' is invalid because the UriTemplate '{1}' does not contain a variable with that name.

data.name: UTBadBaseAddress
data.value: The base address must be an absolute URI with a scheme of http or https and no query or fragment.

data.name: UTBindByNameCalledWithEmptyKey
data.value: UriTemplate.BindByName was called with an empty key in the parameters collection.

data.name: UTBindByPositionNoVariables
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has no variables; UriTemplate.BindByPosition cannot be called with {1} value(s).

data.name: UTBindByPositionWrongCount
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has {1} path variable(s) and {2} query variable(s) but was passed {3} value(s).

data.name: UTBothLiteralAndNameValueCollectionKey
data.value: The key '{0}' appears as both a literal segment and as a name in the name-value collection passed to UriTemplate.BindByName.

data.name: UTCSRLookupBeforeMatch
data.value: Cannot look up compound segment results before a successful Match has been performed.

data.name: UTDefaultValuesAreImmutable
data.value: The Defaults dictionary on the UriTemplate is immutable.

data.name: UTDefaultValueToCompoundSegmentVar
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a compound path segment '{1}' that contains the variable '{2}' for which a default value was specified. Variables in compound segments cannot have default values.

data.name: UTDefaultValueToCompoundSegmentVarFromAdditionalDefaults
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}', but that variable appears inside a compound segment and cannot have a default value.

data.name: UTDefaultValueToQueryVar
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Query variables cannot have default values.

data.name: UTDefaultValueToQueryVarFromAdditionalDefaults
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for query variable '{1}'. Query variables cannot have default values.

data.name: UTDoesNotSupportAdjacentVarsInCompoundSegment
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' contains compound path segment '{1}' with two adjacent variables. Adjacent variables in compound segments are not supported.

data.name: UTInvalidDefaultPathValue
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. The default value of a path variable cannot be null, empty, or contain a path separator.

data.name: UTInvalidFormatSegmentOrQueryPart
data.value: The segment or query part '{0}' has an invalid format. Variable names must be enclosed in matching braces.

data.name: UTInvalidVarDeclaration
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid variable declaration '{1}'.

data.name: UTInvalidWildcardInVariableOrLiteral
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid usage of wildcard '{1}'. Wildcards are only allowed as the last path segment and cannot be combined with other characters in the same segment.

data.name: UTNullableDefaultAtAdditionalDefaults
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}' that is null. Nullable defaults are only allowed when declared inline in the template.

data.name: UTNullableDefaultMustBeFollowedWithNullables
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by variable '{2}' which is not nullable. All path variables after a nullable variable must also be nullable.

data.name: UTNullableDefaultMustNotBeFollowedWithLiteral
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by literal segment '{2}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by literal segments.

data.name: UTNullableDefaultMustNotBeFollowedWithWildcard
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by a wildcard segment.

data.name: UTQueryCannotEndInAmpersand
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query string that ends in '&'.

data.name: UTQueryCannotHaveCompoundValue
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value that is a compound (mixed literal and variable) expression. Query values must be either pure literals or pure variables.

data.name: UTQueryCannotHaveEmptyName
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with an empty name.

data.name: UTQueryMustHaveLiteralNames
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with a variable name. Query parameter names must be literals.

data.name: UTQueryNamesMustBeUnique
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple query parameters with the same name. Query parameter names must be unique within a template.

data.name: UTStarVariableWithDefaults
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has wildcard variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.

data.name: UTStarVariableWithDefaultsFromAdditionalDefaults
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has additional default value for wildcard variable '{1}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.

data.name: UTTAmbiguousQueries
data.value: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings. Conflicting templates: '{0}'.

data.name: UTTBaseAddressMustBeAbsolute
data.value: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.

data.name: UTTBaseAddressNotSet
data.value: The UriTemplateTable's BaseAddress must be set before this operation can be performed.

data.name: UTTCannotChangeBaseAddress
data.value: The BaseAddress of the UriTemplateTable cannot be changed after the table has been made read-only.

data.name: UTTDuplicate
data.value: UriTemplateTable contains duplicate templates: '{0}' and '{1}'.

data.name: UTTEmptyKeyValuePairs
data.value: The KeyValuePairs collection of the UriTemplateTable cannot be empty.

data.name: UTTInvalidTemplateKey
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid UriTemplate string for use as a key in a UriTemplateTable.

data.name: UTTMultipleMatches
data.value: The URI matched multiple UriTemplates in this UriTemplateTable. Use Match() instead of MatchSingle() to get all results.

data.name: UTTMustBeAbsolute
data.value: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.

data.name: UTTNullTemplateKey
data.value: A UriTemplate key in the UriTemplateTable's KeyValuePairs collection cannot be null.

data.name: UTTOtherAmbiguousQueries
data.value: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings: '{0}'.

data.name: UTVarNamesMustBeUnique
data.value: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple variables with the name '{1}'. Variable names must be unique within a template.

data.name: DefaultContentFormatNotAllowedInProperty
data.value: WebContentFormat.Default cannot be set on a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty; use Xml, Json, or Raw instead.

data.name: EncoderEnvelopeVersionMismatch
data.value: The envelope version of the outgoing message ({0}) does not match the envelope version of the encoder ({1}).

data.name: ErrorEncounteredInContentTypeMapper
data.value: The WebContentTypeMapper threw an exception while attempting to map the content type. See the inner exception for details.

data.name: JsonOnlySupportsMessageVersionNone
data.value: WebMessageEncodingBindingElement only supports MessageVersion.None.

data.name: JsonValueMustBeInRange
data.value: The value must be in the range [{0}, {1}].

data.name: MaxSentMessageSizeExceeded
data.value: The maximum message size quota for outgoing messages ({0}) has been exceeded.

data.name: MessageBodyIsStream
data.value: The message body is a Stream and cannot be re-read.

data.name: MessageBodyMissing
data.value: The message body is missing or empty.

data.name: MessageBodyReaderInvalidReadState
data.value: The XmlReader used to read the message body is in an invalid read state '{0}'.

data.name: MessageBufferIsClosed
data.value: The MessageBuffer has been closed and can no longer be used.

data.name: MessageClosed
data.value: The message has been closed and can no longer be used.

data.name: MessageVersionUnknown
data.value: Unknown MessageVersion.

data.name: UnknownWebEncodingFormat
data.value: Unknown WebContentFormat '{0}'.

data.name: ValueMustBeNonNegative
data.value: The value supplied must be non-negative.

data.name: ValueMustBePositive
data.value: The value supplied must be greater than zero.

data.name: WebBodyFormatPropertyToString
data.value: WebBodyFormatMessageProperty(Format={0})

data.name: WebHttpRawContentNotSupported
data.value: Raw (application/octet-stream pass-through) content is not yet supported by the WebHttpBinding client. Use Xml or Json instead, or convert your payload to a typed parameter.

data.name: WebHttpServerSideOperationSelectorNotSupported
data.value: WebHttpDispatchOperationSelector is server-side and is not supported in the client-only port of System.ServiceModel.Web. Construct a UriTemplate manually from the [WebGet]/[WebInvoke] attribute on your contract instead.

data.name: ConditionalRetrieveGetAndHeadOnly
data.value: Conditional retrieval (If-Modified-Since, If-None-Match) is only supported for HTTP GET and HEAD requests.

data.name: ConditionalUpdatePutPostAndDeleteOnly
data.value: Conditional update (If-Match, If-Unmodified-Since) is only supported for HTTP PUT, POST, and DELETE requests.

data.name: HttpContextNoIncomingMessageProperty
data.value: HTTP context property '{0}' is missing from the incoming message. This typically means the message did not arrive over the WebHttpBinding transport.

data.name: WeakEntityTagsNotSupported
data.value: Weak entity tags (W/"...") are not supported in this context.

data.name: XmlBufferQuotaExceeded
data.value: The XmlBuffer's quota has been exceeded.

data.name: AtMostOneRequestBodyParameterAllowedForStream
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple request body parameters, one of which is a Stream. When the Stream is a parameter, there can be no other parameters in the body.

data.name: AtMostOneRequestBodyParameterAllowedForUnwrappedMessages
data.value: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies multiple request body parameters to be serialized without any wrapper elements. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the BodyStyle property on the WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute to Wrapped.

data.name: BufferedOutputStreamQuotaExceeded
data.value: The size quota for this stream ({0}) has been exceeded.

data.name: BufferIsNotRightSizeForBufferManager
data.value: This buffer cannot be returned to the buffer manager because it is the wrong size.

data.name: CannotDeserializeBody
data.value: Unable to deserialize XML body with root name '{0}' and root namespace '{1}' (for operation '{2}' and contract ('{3}', '{4}')) using {5}. Ensure that the type corresponding to the XML is added to the known types collection of the service.

data.name: CannotSerializeType
data.value: Type '{0}' of operation '{1}' and contract ('{2}', '{3}') could not be serialized. Ensure that the type can be serialized using {4} and add the type to the known types collection of the service if required.

data.name: CertificateUnsupportedForHttpTransportCredentialOnly
data.value: Certificate-based client authentication is not supported in TransportCredentialOnly security mode. Select the Transport security mode.

data.name: ConfigInvalidEncodingValue
data.value: {0} is not a valid encoding string for System.Text.Encoding.GetEncoding(string).

data.name: CrossDomainJavascriptAuthNotSupported
data.value: Cross domain javascript callback is not supported in authenticated services.

data.name: CrossDomainJavascriptNotsupported
data.value: CrossDomainScriptAccessEnabled cannot be used in Clients.

data.name: DuplicateRegistration
data.value: A registration already exists for URI '{0}'.

data.name: EncoderBadContentType
data.value: Cannot process contentType.

data.name: EncoderUnrecognizedCharSet
data.value: Unrecognized charSet '{0}' in contentType.

data.name: EndpointAddressCannotBeNull
data.value: The ServiceEndpoint's Address is null. Address must be an absolute uri.

data.name: FormatterCannotBeUsedForReplyMessages
data.value: This message formatter cannot be used to process response messages.

data.name: FormatterCannotBeUsedForRequestMessages
data.value: This message formatter cannot be used to process request messages.

data.name: GETCannotHaveBody
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has body parameter '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. Either make the parameter '{2}' a UriTemplate parameter, or switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.

data.name: GETCannotHaveMCParameter
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has a parameter of MessageContract type '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. To use a MessageContract parameter type, switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.

data.name: HelpPageEndpointNotFound
data.value: Endpoint not found.

data.name: HelpPageEndpointNotFoundWithLink
data.value: Endpoint not found. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.

data.name: HelpPageHtml
data.value: BODY { color: #000000; background-color: white; font-family: Verdana; margin-left: 0px; margin-top: 0px; } #content { margin-left: 30px; font-size: .70em; padding-bottom: 2em; } A:link { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:visited { color: #6699cc; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:active { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } .heading1 { background-color: #003366; border-bottom: #336699 6px solid; color: #ffffff; font-family: Tahoma; font-size: 26px; font-weight: normal;margin: 0em 0em 10px -20px; padding-bottom: 8px; padding-left: 30px;padding-top: 16px;} pre { font-size:small; background-color: #e5e5cc; padding: 5px; font-family: Courier New; margin-top: 0px; border: 1px #f0f0e0 solid; white-space: pre-wrap; white-space: -pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; } table { border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; font-family: Verdana;} table th { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; font-weight: bold; background-color: #cecf9c;} table td { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; background-color: #e5e5cc;}

data.name: HelpPageMethodNotAllowed
data.value: Method not allowed.

data.name: HelpPageMethodNotAllowedWithLink
data.value: Method not allowed. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.

data.name: HelpPageRedirect
data.value: There is no operation listening for {0}, but there is an operation listening for {1}, so you are being redirected there.

data.name: HelpPageRequestErrorTitle
data.value: Request Error

data.name: HelpPageTitleText
data.value: Service

data.name: HelpServerErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: The server encountered an error processing the request. See server logs for more details.

data.name: HelpServerErrorProcessingRequestWithDetails
data.value: The server encountered an error processing the request. The exception message is '{0}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:

data.name: HelpServerErrorProcessingRequestWithDetailsAndLink
data.value: The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service. The exception message is '{1}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:

data.name: HelpServerErrorProcessingRequestWithLink
data.value: <p>The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the <a rel="help-page" href="{0}">service help page</a> for constructing valid requests to the service.</p>

data.name: HttpClientCredentialTypeInvalid
data.value: ClientCredentialType '{0}' can only be used on the server side, not the client side. Please use one of the following values instead 'None, Basic, Client, Digest, Ntlm, Windows'.

data.name: HttpUnhandledOperationInvokerCalledWithoutMessage
data.value: A message was dispatched to the UnhandledDispatchOperation, but was invoked without a Message as input. This error might be caused by a behavior that provided a bad IDispatchMessageFormatter for the EndpointDispatcher's DispatchRuntime's UnhandledDispatchOperation's Formatter.

data.name: InvalidHttpMessageFormat
data.value: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') contains an unrecognized http body format value '{3}'. The expected body format value is '{4}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

data.name: InvalidHttpMessageFormat3
data.value: Incoming message for operation '{0}' contains an unrecognized http body format value '{1}'. The expected body format value is '{2}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

data.name: InvalidMessageContractWithoutWrapperName
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a MessageContract parameter (of type '{2}') without a wrapper name and with more than one body element. MessageContract parameters without a wrapper element are supported only if they have zero or one body element.

data.name: InvalidMethodWithSOAPHeaders
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses a MessageContract that has SOAP headers. SOAP headers are not supported by the None MessageVersion.

data.name: JsonFormatRequiresDataContract
data.value: Operation '{0}' (in contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') specifies the http body format to be JSON but the serialization mechanism for the operation is not DataContract. JSON format is only supported with DataContract serialization. If you have an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute on the operation consider replacing it with DataContractFormatAttribute.

data.name: JsonFormatterExpectedAttributeNull
data.value: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'null'. Found value '{0}'.

data.name: JsonFormatterExpectedAttributeObject
data.value: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'object'. Found value '{0}'.

data.name: LockTimeoutExceptionMessage
data.value: Cannot claim lock within the allotted timeout of {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.

data.name: ManualAddressingCannotBeFalseWithTransportBindingElement
data.value: In the endpoint at '{0}', in order to use '{1}', the '{2}' of the binding must have ManualAddressing set to true.

data.name: MaxReceivedMessageSizeExceeded
data.value: The maximum message size quota for incoming messages ({0}) has been exceeded. To increase the quota, use the MaxReceivedMessageSize property on the appropriate binding element.

data.name: MCAtMostOneRequestBodyParameterAllowedForUnwrappedMessages
data.value: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies MessageContract type '{2}' which has IsWrapped as false but has multiple request body parameters. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the IsWrapped property on the MessageContractAttribute to true.

data.name: MessageFormatPropertyNotFound
data.value: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.

data.name: MessageFormatPropertyNotFound2
data.value: Message does not contain the http body format property. The encoder expects the http format property to be '{0}'.

data.name: MessageFormatPropertyNotFound3
data.value: Incoming message does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.

data.name: MessageTextEncodingNotSupported
data.value: The text encoding '{0}' used in the text message format is not supported.

data.name: MultipleOperationsInContractWithPathMethod
data.value: In contract '{0}', there are multiple operations with Method '{2}' and a UriTemplate that is equivalent to '{1}'. Each operation requires a unique combination of UriTemplate and Method to unambiguously dispatch messages. Use WebGetAttribute or WebInvokeAttribute to alter the UriTemplate and Method values of an operation.

data.name: MultipleWebAttributes
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has both WebGetAttribute and WebInvokeAttribute; only one can be present.

data.name: NoOutOrRefParametersAllowedWithStreamResult
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a Stream return value and also has out or ref parameters. When Stream is the return value of the operation, it cannot have ref or out parameters.

data.name: NoOutOrRefStreamParametersAllowed
data.value: Parameter '{0}' of operation '{1}' in contract '{2}' is a Stream, and is also a ref or out parameter. Stream cannot be a ref or out parameter.

data.name: ObjectDisposed
data.value: The {0} object has been disposed.

data.name: OnlyDataContractAndXmlSerializerTypesInUnWrappedMode
data.value: WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute supports setting the BodyStyle property to Bare only with DataContract and XmlSerializer serializable types. Operation '{0}' does not specify serialization using any of these formats. Add a DataContractFormatAttribute or XmlSerializerFormatAttribute to this operation to specify one of these serialization formats.

data.name: OnlyReturnValueBodyParameterAllowedForUnwrappedMessages
data.value: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies at least one response body parameter that is not a return value of the operation. Only the return value is allowed when the BodyStyle property of WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute is set to Bare. Either remove the extra response body parameters or set the BodyStyle property to Wrapped.

data.name: OperationDoesNotSupportFormat
data.value: The operation '{0}' does not support '{1}' as a response format.

data.name: OperationNameNotFound
data.value: Could not find operation name in the message properties.

data.name: OperationSelectorNotWebSelector
data.value: This operation is supported only when the operation selector is of type '{0}'.

data.name: ParameterIsNotStreamType
data.value: Parameter type '{0}' of operation '{1}' (contract '{2}' with namespace '{3}') is not of type Stream. Ensure that the parameter is of type Stream or derives from Stream.

data.name: QueryStringFormatterOperationNotSupportedServerSide
data.value: This operation formatter can only be used for deserializing requests; serializing replies is not supported since query strings are not used to represent parameters in replies.

data.name: ReadNotSupported
data.value: Read is not supported on this stream.

data.name: ReceiveShutdownReturnedFault
data.value: The channel received an unexpected fault input message while closing. The fault reason given is: '{0}'

data.name: ReceiveShutdownReturnedLargeFault
data.value: The channel received an unexpected fault input message with Action = '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.

data.name: ReceiveShutdownReturnedMessage
data.value: The channel received an unexpected input message with Action '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.

data.name: ReplyAlreadySent
data.value: ReplyAlreadySent

data.name: RequestContextAborted
data.value: The requestContext has been aborted.

data.name: RpcEncodedNotSupportedForNoneMessageVersion
data.value: Operation '{0}', belonging to contract ('{1}', '{2}') has an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute configured with OperationUse Encoded or OperationStyle Rpc. OperationUse Encoded and OperationStyle Rpc are not supported for web bindings. Configure the endpoint with a SOAP binding (like WSHttpBinding) in order to use these options.

data.name: SeekNotSupported
data.value: Seek is not supported on this stream.

data.name: SerializingReplyNotSupportedByFormatter
data.value: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing replies.

data.name: SerializingRequestNotSupportedByFormatter
data.value: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing requests.

data.name: ServiceModelWebServicesNotRegistered
data.value: Unable to find the endpoint behavior WebHttpBehavior for endpoint address '{0}'. This is possibly caused by not calling ServiceModelWebServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceModelWebServices(IServiceCollection services).

data.name: SFxInvalidCallbackIAsyncResult
data.value: IAsyncResult not provided or of wrong type.

data.name: SFxInvalidMessageBody
data.value: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find node type 'Element' with name '{0}' and namespace '{1}'. Found node type '{2}' with name '{3}' and namespace '{4}'

data.name: SFxInvalidMessageBodyErrorDeserializingParameter
data.value: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. Please see InnerException for more details.

data.name: SFxInvalidMessageBodyErrorDeserializingParameterMore
data.value: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.

data.name: SFxInvalidMessageBodyErrorSerializingParameter
data.value: There was an error while trying to serialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.

data.name: StreamBodyMemberNotSupported
data.value: '{0}' does not allow the use of Streams with the MessageContract programming model. The service '{1}' defines an operation '{2}' that uses the MessageContract type '{3}'. '{3}' contains MessageBodyMember '{4}' of type Stream.

data.name: TaskTimedOutError
data.value: The task timed out after {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.

data.name: TimeoutMustBeNonNegative
data.value: Argument {0} must be a non-negative timeout value. Provided value was {1}.

data.name: TimeoutMustBePositive
data.value: Argument {0} must be a positive timeout value. Provided value was {1}.

data.name: TypeIsNotParameterTypeAndIsNotPresentInKnownTypes
data.value: Cannot serialize parameter of type '{0}' (for operation '{1}', contract '{2}') because it is not the exact type '{3}' in the method signature and is not in the known types collection. In order to serialize the parameter, add the type to the known types collection for the operation using ServiceKnownTypeAttribute.

data.name: TypeNotSupportedByQueryStringConverter
data.value: Type '{0}' is not supported by '{1}'.

data.name: UnrecognizedHttpMessageFormat
data.value: The incoming message has an unexpected message format '{0}'. The expected message formats for the operation are {1}. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

data.name: UriTemplateMissingVar
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a UriTemplate that expects a parameter named '{2}', but there is no input parameter with that name on the operation.

data.name: UriTemplatePathVarMustBeString
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a path variable named '{2}' which does not have type 'string'. Variables for UriTemplate path segments must have type 'string'.

data.name: UriTemplateQueryVarMustBeConvertible
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a query variable named '{2}' of type '{3}', but type '{3}' is not convertible by '{4}'. Variables for UriTemplate query values must have types that can be converted by '{4}'.

data.name: UriTemplateVarCaseDistinction
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple parameters named '{2}' that vary only in uppercase versus lowercase. The parameter names must be distinct.

data.name: UTParamsDoNotComposeWithMessage
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a Message parameter. Message and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.

data.name: UTParamsDoNotComposeWithMessageContract
data.value: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a MessageContract parameter. MessageContract and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.

data.name: WCFBindingCannotBeUsedWithUriOperationSelectorBehaviorBadMessageVersion
data.value: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with the None MessageVersion. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.

data.name: WCFBindingCannotBeUsedWithUriOperationSelectorBehaviorBadScheme
data.value: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with Scheme 'http' or 'https'. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.

data.name: WebBehaviorNotFoundWithEndpoint
data.value: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a behavior of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper behavior and it should not be removed or replaced.

data.name: WebHttpBindingNotFoundWithEndpoint
data.value: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a binding of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper binding and it should not be removed or replaced.

data.name: WebHttpServiceEndpointCannotHaveMessageHeaders
data.value: The endpoint address '{0}' has message headers and is being used with a binding that's configured for message version None. Either change the endpoint address to not contain message headers or change the binding to be one that supports SOAP (for example, WSHttpBinding).

data.name: WebRequestDidNotMatchMethod
data.value: The HTTP method '{0}' of the incoming request (with URI '{1}') is not allowed.

data.name: WebRequestDidNotMatchOperation
data.value: The incoming HTTP request's URI '{0}' does not match any service operation.

data.name: XmlSerializersCreatedBeforeRegistration
data.value: New types cannot be registered with serializer manager after the service has been opened.

data.name: XmlWriterBackedStreamMethodNotSupported
data.value: The '{0}' method is not supported by the stream.

data.name: XmlWriterBackedStreamPropertyGetNotSupported
data.value: The get accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.

data.name: XmlWriterBackedStreamPropertySetNotSupported
data.value: The set accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.
